errors.description: The configuration file is malformed or contains invalid values
errors.hint: Check the configuration file syntax and ensure all required fields are present

errors.description: The requested Perl version is not installed or available
errors.hint: Use 'pvm list' to see available versions or install with 'pvm install <version>'

errors.description: Insufficient permissions to perform the requested operation
errors.hint: Try running with elevated privileges or check file permissions

errors.description: Variable assignment type does not match declared type
errors.hint: Ensure the assigned value matches the variable's declared type
Declare the variable with 'my', 'our', or 'state' before use

errors.description: Type expression contains invalid syntax or undefined types
errors.hint: Check the type syntax and ensure all referenced types are defined

errors.description: The requested module could not be found on CPAN
errors.hint: Check the module name spelling or try a different CPAN mirror

errors.description: Module dependencies have conflicting version requirements
errors.hint: Update conflicting modules or use a compatible version

errors.description: The Perl script exited with a non-zero status
errors.hint: Check the script for runtime errors or syntax issues

errors.description: Script execution exceeded the configured timeout limit
errors.hint: Increase the timeout limit or optimize the script performance
